description: Same test has been tried to fix 3 times with similar patches — narrow next step to one
input:
I've been trying to fix this test for 3 rounds.

Attempt 1: Added nil check on line 42 → still fails
Attempt 2: Changed nil check to empty string check → still fails
Attempt 3: Added both checks → still fails

Error: 'unexpected nil pointer dereference in handler.Process'
Test: TestProcessRequest_NilInput

description: Changes are accumulating without progress — recommend stopping over adding more changes
input:
I started with a one-line fix but now I've changed 8 files and the tests are still failing. Each fix seems to open a new problem. Should I keep going?

Changed files: auth.go, middleware.go, handler.go, config.go, types.go, models.go, routes.go, main.go
Original problem: login endpoint returning 500
Current problem: same 500, plus 3 new test failures

description: First attempt at fixing a test — this is not a loop, should not suggest stopping
input:
I just ran the tests for the first time after my change. TestUserAuth is failing.

Error: expected status 200 got 401
My change: added JWT validation in auth middleware
